The '''Lifesaver 1000 Reserve Hyperdrive''' was a Class 5.0 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] made by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]]. It was recommended for [[Backup hyperdrive|backup]] use only and needed to be overhauled after each use.<ref name="GG6-2" /> Contrary to its name, the Lifesaver 1000 was an unreliable and unsafe hyperdrive unit even while new. [[Fenig Nabon]] decided against such a drive for [[Star Lady|her ship]], choosing instead to import from off-planet rather than install the "death wish."<ref name="ST">{{StoryCite|story=Simple Tricks|book=Tales from the New Republic}}</ref>
